{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Forged blood dragon
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|A [[Forged blood dragon]] hits the [[Silent King]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18">''Dreadgod'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
